ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training session (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training session */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the training session */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the training session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training session was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the training session */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID who last updated the model */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "explained_variance" REAL /* Explained variance metric */,
  "fps" INTEGER /* Frames per second metric */,
  "nupdates" INTEGER /* Number of updates metric */,
  "policy_entropy" REAL /* Policy entropy metric */,
  "policy_loss" REAL /* Policy loss metric */,
  "total_timesteps" INTEGER /* Total timesteps metric */,
  "value_loss" REAL /* Value loss metric */,
  "record_time" TEXT /* Time when the metric was recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the session */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the session was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_access_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric that triggered the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
